hooks.command: MSG="no changes"; cd "/d/Work/Claude Projects/AI Watsapp PG Accountant" && if [ -n "$(git status --porcelain 2>/dev/null)" ]; then git add -A >/dev/null 2>&1 && git commit -m "auto: $(date '+%Y-%m-%d %H:%M')" >/dev/null 2>&1 && git push >/dev/null 2>&1 && { if git show --name-only HEAD 2>/dev/null | grep -q '^web/'; then CMD='cd /opt/pg-accountant && git pull && cd web && npm run build && systemctl restart kozzy-pwa && systemctl restart pg-accountant'; else CMD='cd /opt/pg-accountant && git pull && systemctl restart pg-accountant'; fi; ssh -i ~/.ssh/id_ed25519 -o ConnectTimeout=30 -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no root@187.127.130.194 "$CMD" >/dev/null 2>&1 & MSG="committed + deploying"; }; fi; printf '{"systemMessage": "auto: %s"}' "$MSG"
